name: AGE_GROUP
rule: Bucket age into <18 18-64 >=65 (strict on both bounds).

name: TREATMENT_DURATION
rule: Days from treatment_start_date to visit_date. Null if either is missing or visit precedes treatment.

name: RESPONSE_FLAG
rule: CR or PR => RESPONDER. SD or PD => NON_RESPONDER. Otherwise null.

name: RISK_GROUP
rule: Score = (lab_value > 7.0 ? 2 : lab_value > 5.0 ? 1 : 0) + (age >= 65 ? 2 : age >= 50 ? 1 : 0). HIGH if score >= 3, MEDIUM if score >= 1, otherwise LOW.

name: ANALYSIS_POP_FLAG
rule: Y if age >= 18 AND TREATMENT_DURATION >= 1 day; otherwise N.

name: COMPOSITE_RISK_TIER
rule: If ANALYSIS_POP_FLAG != Y then TIER_LOW. Else if RISK_GROUP == HIGH then TIER_HIGH. Else if RISK_GROUP == MEDIUM then TIER_MEDIUM. Else TIER_LOW.
